topic.what: Batched threshold encryption scheme with shortest ciphertext
topic.how: ElGamal-style encryption in GT using punctured powers-of-tau values; FFT-accelerated O(B log B) decryption
topic.why_matters: Provides censorship-resistant epochless threshold encryption with smallest ciphertext |G1|+|GT| among all known schemes

characteristics.what_it_measures: Size of encrypted message including NIZK proof overhead
characteristics.vs_baseline: Smallest among all prior BTE schemes (prior art: 2|G1|+|GT|=2*48+576=672 bytes)
characteristics.evidence: Table 1 comparison with all prior schemes
characteristics.context: CPA ciphertext is |G1|+|GT|; CCA adds 2|GT| for NIZK proof

characteristics.what_it_measures: Computational cost to decrypt batch of B ciphertexts
characteristics.vs_baseline: Matches [ABD+25];优于 TrX O(B log^2 B)
characteristics.evidence: Section 6 FFT technique; Section 7 benchmarks confirm scaling
characteristics.context: FFT-accelerated using Toeplitz structure for cross-terms

characteristics.what_it_measures: End-to-end decryption time for full batch
characteristics.vs_baseline: 4x faster than TrX (46.2s); 2.2x faster than [ABD+25] (28.4s) at B=2048
characteristics.context: BLS12-381 curve, single-threaded M5 MacBook Pro

characteristics.vs_baseline: Constant time independent of batch size

characteristics.what_it_measures: Storage per party for threshold shares
characteristics.vs_baseline: Same as [BNRT26]; larger than epoch-based schemes O(1)
characteristics.evidence: Table 1; shares grow with batch size
characteristics.context: Each party holds B secret shares for polynomial secret sharing

characteristics.vs_baseline: More expensive than DKG-based schemes but enables epochless property
characteristics.context: MPC setup required for each batch batch decryption session

requires: Sufficient committee size N >= threshold t

novelty: Shortest ciphertext |G1|+|GT| among all BTE schemes
Conceptually simpler construction using ElGamal with punctured powers
FFT-acceleration reduces decryption from O(B^2) to O(B log B)
open_problems: Reduce secret key size from O(B) to O(1)
Explore alternative NIZK proofs for smaller CCA overhead
